---
title: "漫长的求证"
description: "长篇小说《漫长的求证》章节目录页，关于县城、物理、异乡与漫长求索。"
lang: zh-CN
image: "https://yuda-bi.com/files/novels/%E6%BC%AB%E9%95%BF%E7%9A%84%E6%B1%82%E8%AF%81.jpg"
image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
open-graph:
  locale: zh_CN
  image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
twitter-card:
  image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
css: ../../novels.css
---

::: {.novels-page}

::: {.novel-detail-hero}
::: {.novel-detail-hero-inner}
::: {.novel-detail-cover}
![漫长的求证](../../files/novels/漫长的求证.jpg){.cover-img}
:::
::: {.novel-detail-header}
[长篇小说 &middot; 三部十六章]{.novels-label-en}

# 漫长的求证 {.novel-detail-title}

[沉 &middot; 隧 &middot; 渠]{.novel-detail-subtitle}

::: {.novel-detail-synopsis}
傍晚起了风，她蹲在县城的水泥台阶上做题，他蹲在旁边替她挡风。后来劳燕分飞，纸页一翻，天便换了颜色。他带着那本卷了边的旧课本去了大洋彼岸，扉页上那行铅笔小字，成了此后所有公式的源头。
:::

[&larr; 返回小说列表](/novels.html){.novel-back-link}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.novels-content}

::: {.novel-toc-section}

::: {.novel-progress-note}
目前已整理正文试读：第一章《粉笔》与第二章《简并态》。
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第一部
:::

## 沉 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-01-fenbi/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
一
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[粉笔](chapter-01-fenbi/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
搬家时翻出的旧《统计物理》，把陆沉重新带回县城台阶上那一片被风吹白的夏天。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-02-jianbingtai/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
二
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[简并态](chapter-02-jianbingtai/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
实验班、水房电话与“简并态”的一句解释，让两个人之间的距离第一次有了清晰的轮廓。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
三
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
断流
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
四
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
开放系统
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
五
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
渡
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第二部
:::

## 隧 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
六
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
信号与噪声
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
七
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
先验
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
八
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
薄冰
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
九
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
旷野中的灯
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
基线
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十一
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
暗物质
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十二
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
相变
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第三部
:::

## 渠 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十三
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
三票
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十四
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
故人
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十五
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
薪尽火传
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十六
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
源头
:::
:::

:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {.novels-footer}
::: {.novels-footer-inner}
“章名并排搁着，前后遥遥照应，草蛇灰线，伏脉千里。”
:::
:::

:::
